description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a flat roof and a mix of dark and light exterior finishes. The front facade is accented by vertical wooden slats and large glass windows, providing a striking contrast to the darker upper volume. The property is enclosed by a low perimeter wall and includes a paved driveway and walkway leading to the main entrance. The structure appears to be two stories, with the upper level slightly cantilevered over the lower, creating a sheltered area at the entrance. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large picture windows and others more narrow and vertical. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, dark and light exterior finishes, large glass windows, and a minimalist geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, vertical wooden slats, large glass windows, and paved driveway.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the cantilevered upper story and the dark, solid rear facade.
description_view_2: Back view dominated by a large, dark rectangular volume with minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Side view showing the layered structure, perimeter wall, and paved side yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a recessed door with vertical wooden slats, a paved approach, and a sheltered overhang created by the cantilevered upper story.
